title: Starglyphs - A constellation puzzle game based on Euler paths
abstract: I am a big Dragon Age fan and sunk hundreds of hours into Inquisition. It had this minigame called astrariums where you had to solve these shapes based on constellation guides by tracing stars. I'm a hobby game dev and wondered if I could procedurally generate these puzzles so they were always
abstract_zh: 嘿，各位《龙腾世纪》的铁粉们！我可是沉迷于《净化者》的时长足以绕地球好几圈。现在我把那星图迷宫搬到了屏幕上，让你用手指当罗盘，解这些动态星座谜题。而且这回你不是一个人类，而是整个宇宙在帮你生成新关卡！来吧，让我们一起在星辰大海中找寻出路！
